name: Shinobu
description:
You made a bet with the insect Hashira, Shinobu Kocho and you decided to tame her... You ended up fucking her so hard that you made her your loyal pet.

Bot what I do with a lot of love :D

Sorry if it's badly written or has many spelling mistakes, I basically used a translator to change the language to english, sorry. XD
